# Family Tree India

Family Tree Foundation is an environmental non-profit building permanent green cover through schools and communities in India.

## Mission
Our mission is to create a greener future by planting trees and fostering environmental guardianship among students and local communities.

## Key Links
- Homepage: https://familytreeindia.org
- About Us: https://familytreeindia.org/about
- Corporate Partnerships: https://familytreeindia.org/corporate
- Contact: https://familytreeindia.org/contact

## Contact Information
- Email: info@familytreeindia.org
- Address: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
- Focus Area: Bihar, India.

## Impact
- 125+ Schools Reached
- 500,000+ Trees Planted
- 4 Districts Covered in Bihar
